gist.headline: HatimPro joins the garden
gist.blurb: HatimPro has sprouted in our community greenhouse! It's a beautiful new app built by the community for tracking reading progress and joining communal rooms.
gist.summary: Added HatimPro, a comprehensive lifestyle application for tracking reading progress and daily habits, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: The community can now discover and explore HatimPro in the apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a community app (HatimPro) focused on reading, tracking progress, and communal rooms. Visuals: Polly the bee reading a beautifully bound book in a cozy greenhouse setting, surrounded by blooming code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, peacefully reading a beautifully bound book inside a warm, glowing greenhouse. Lush code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots around her. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
